name: Shield
special: Sacrifice to avoid all damage from an attack

name: Light Weapon
description: A dagger, or small axe, hammer, or other light weapon

name: Boot Knife
description: A slender blade that can be concealed in a boot or other piece of clothing.

name: Hefty Weapon
description: A one-handed weapon, such as a mace, sword, warhammer, pick, etc

name: Polearm
description: A two-handed weapon designed to keep enemies at reach, such as a longspear, glaive, halberd, etc

name: Heavy Melee Weapon
description: A two-handed weapon such as a Greatsword, Maul, Battle Axe, etc

name: Mastercrafted Light Weapon
special: Only available to 2nd years and above

name: Mastercrafted Hefty Weapon
special: Only available to 2nd years and above

name: Mastercrafted Polearm
special: Only available to 2nd years and above

name: Mastercrafted Heavy Weapon
special: Only available to 2nd years and above

name: Tunnel Bow
description: A compact shortbow with several compound pulleys resembling a slingshot

name: Novice Delver's Pick
description: A one-handed climber's pick with an Aetherstone embedded in the head, a caribiner clip on the hilt, and zip line casters
special: Only available to 2nd years and above. Aetherstone can emit light for 1 hour until recharged. Metal casters allow the user to clip it to a rope or other line and zip line. Can be fastened to a harness. Grants a boon for Climbing.

name: Heavy Crossbow
description: A large crossbow with complex mechanism

name: Hand Ballista
tags: Far, Slow, Bulky, 2H, Ranged, Armor Piercing

name: Lupine Bolt-Thrower
description: A magitech repeating crossbow that fires steel spikes
